acceptance_targets: [chapter_03_f01] Pass if the revised labor-yard movement centered on snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_03.md:13 and the adjacent refusal beats at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_03.md:17, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_03.md:33, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_03.md:79 shows the sorting logic through at least one added concrete on-page choice or insult, and no paragraph in that section depends on more than one abstract thesis sentence to explain what Miami is doing. Fail if the hierarchy is still carried mainly by authorial summary.

[chapter_03_f02] Pass if the final movement beginning at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_03.md:305 ends with a direct exchange or observable concealment inside or at the apartment threshold that puts Delroy's cover story under pressure. Fail if the chapter still ends on preparation, anticipation, or props without anyone receiving or contesting the lie.

[chapter_03_f03] Pass if the revised passages at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_03.md:111, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_03.md:205, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_03.md:223, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_03.md:311, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_03.md:317, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_03.md:325 contain no more than two abstract corrective formulas of this type across the set, and at least two of the current thesis sentences have been replaced by concrete scene-bound detail. Fail if the same argumentative cadence still dominates those moments.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if the revised labor-yard movement centered on snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_03.md:13 and the adjacent refusal beats at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_03.md:17, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_03.md:33, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_03.md:79 shows the sorting logic through at least one added concrete on-page choice or insult, and no paragraph in that section depends on more than one abstract thesis sentence to explain what Miami is doing. Fail if the hierarchy is still carried mainly by authorial summary.
findings.problem: The chapter states its labor-and-poverty thesis too directly in several key places, so some of the strongest social material arrives as explanation rather than as fresh dramatic pressure. The labor yard is legible, but the chapter sometimes tells the reader what Miami means instead of forcing Delroy to learn it through one more irreducible on-page collision.
findings.rewrite_direction: Rework the abstract summary beats at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_03.md:13, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_03.md:105, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_03.md:311 against the live refusal/selection moments at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_03.md:17, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_03.md:33, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_03.md:79. Keep the racial and linguistic sorting system, but let at least one more concrete interaction, refusal, or body-read carry the meaning that is currently being summarized.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if the final movement beginning at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_03.md:305 ends with a direct exchange or observable concealment inside or at the apartment threshold that puts Delroy's cover story under pressure. Fail if the chapter still ends on preparation, anticipation, or props without anyone receiving or contesting the lie.
findings.problem: The chapter earns a hard irreversible choice when Delroy takes Claude's money, then spends too much of its closing stretch in camouflage logistics and anticipated questions. By ending on Delroy preparing his face instead of spending the lie in scene, the chapter delays its sharpest immediate consequence rather than landing it.
findings.rewrite_direction: Compress or sharpen the aftermath material beginning at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_03.md:305 and carry the chapter through at least one concrete threshold interaction at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_03.md:323 or immediately after snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_03.md:327. The revision should make Delroy actively use, hide, or explain the money in front of Marcia or another household witness, so the debt changes leverage before the chapter cuts away.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if the revised passages at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_03.md:111, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_03.md:205, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_03.md:223, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_03.md:311, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_03.md:317, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_03.md:325 contain no more than two abstract corrective formulas of this type across the set, and at least two of the current thesis sentences have been replaced by concrete scene-bound detail. Fail if the same argumentative cadence still dominates those moments.
findings.problem: A repeated prose habit of corrective aphorism and thesis closure becomes visible across the chapter: 'That was ... This was ...', 'Everybody ...', 'Poor people got ...', 'It was money, yes. It was also ...'. The sentences are individually competent, but in aggregate they start to feel like authorial verdicts arriving on schedule rather than pressure discovered in the moment.
findings.rewrite_direction: Vary the sentence architecture in the interpretive beats at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_03.md:111, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_03.md:205, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_03.md:223, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_03.md:311, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_03.md:317, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_03.md:325. Replace at least two of the abstract corrective or universalizing lines with concrete bodily, spatial, or material detail tied to Delroy's immediate experience.

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: Lean into embarrassment, erotic consequence, moral compromise, and the ugly arithmetic of poverty. When a scene turns on prejudice, bureaucracy, violence, or family betrayal, stay with the room long enough for the reader to feel what each choice costs. Resolve edge cases by choosing the more specific and less flattering truth unless it breaks established character logic.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If sex, racism, injury, debt, hunger, or shame is rendered abstractly, rewrite until the bodily detail, social pressure, and changed leverage are visible on the page.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: high — contractions are the spoken norm across the novel; uncontracted forms should appear only for emphasis, ceremony, legal language, or character-specific pressure.

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: Vary scene count, dialogue density, and chapter motor across the book: pair public humiliation with private aftermath, follow argument chapters with information-turn or weather chapters, preserve at least three genuinely quiet domestic or communal stretches, and never let more than three chapters in a row hinge on debate followed by decisive action.
prose_style_profile.diction: Contemporary and concrete, with Caribbean-American texture carried naturally in syntax and reference rather than in italicized glossary behavior; lyrical when earned, blunt when the room turns brutal.
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: close third person that rotates by chapter; intimate enough for bodily shame and private contradiction, but alert to class performance, racial reading, and room dynamics.
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: Alternate lean pressure sentences with occasional longer image-bearing sentences; lyric lift should arrive at emotional turns, never as constant prestige haze.
